arts.ttl: Chelsea ready formal bid for Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: Chelsea are set to approach Manchester United over a deal to sign Alejandro Garnacho before the deadline. Garnacho has emerged as a player of interest to Chelsea after it was revealed that Manchester United would consider significant proposals. Chelsea opened talks with the Red Devils to request the conditions of a potential deal before international […] The post Chelsea ready formal bid for Alejandro Garnacho first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Man Utd rejected $50 A WEEK star snapped up by City
arts.sum: Khusanov was a virtual unknown when playing for Uzbekistan at the U20 World Cup in 2023 when he caught the eye of Lens and was snapped up for just €100,000 from Energetik Minsk. That Khusanov has the 'Manchester United DNA.' That's when I realised he would end up at a big club.
